    1. TwinDisciplines()

Class TwinDisciplines

java.lang.Object
nongui.baseentity.BaseCard
nongui.baseentity.TriggerCard
nongui.baseentity.cards.ModifierCard.ModifierCard
nongui.listofcards.modifiercard.TwinDisciplines
public class TwinDisciplines extends ModifierCard
Represents the "Twin Disciplines" Modifier Card.

"The body bends, the spirit does not." Effect: Provides a balanced modifier of either +2 or -2 to a roll.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TwinDisciplines()
    Constructs a new Twin Disciplines card with its identity and modifier values.
